name: Nocobase
tagline: NocoBase is the most extensible AI-powered no-code/low-code platform.
description:
NocoBase is the most extensible AI-powered no-code/low-code platform.

Docs: https://docs.nocobase.com/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  nocobase:
    image: nocobase/nocobase:1.9.33
    environment:
      - APP_KEY=NzA4ZGIzYmIxNWRkYjcyZmViNTFlMzVj
      - DB_DIALECT=postgres
      - DB_HOST=postgres
      - DB_PORT=5432
      - DB_DATABASE=${POSTGRES_DB:-nocobase-db}
      - DB_USER=u4173e3e994
      - DB_PASSWORD=8a9f2aaceef753f2e868d4fa9030a723
    volumes:
      - nocobase-storage:/app/nocobase/storage
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42082:13000
  postgres:
    image: postgres:17-alpine
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=u4173e3e994
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=8a9f2aaceef753f2e868d4fa9030a723
      - POSTGRES_DB=${POSTGRES_DB:-nocobase-db}
    volumes:
      - postgres-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -U $${POSTGRES_USER:-liv1024b21c} -d $${POSTGRES_DB:-nocobase}
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  nocobase-storage: null
  postgres-data: null
